description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image. Add a job called test:cargo (default stage) that runs the script commands: apt-get update; apt-get -y install qemu-system; rustup default nightly-2019-11-01; rustup show; rustc --version && cargo --version; rustup component add rust-src; rustup component add llvm-tools-preview; cargo install cargo-xbuild; cargo install bootimage --version "^0.7.3". The job has no caches, artifacts, or rules.
